nasb.text: “Speak to Rehoboam the son of Solomon, king of Judah, and to all the house of Judah and Benjamin and to the rest of the people, saying,

esv.text: “Say to Rehoboam the son of Solomon, king of Judah, and to all the house of Judah and Benjamin, and to the rest of the people,

cnv.text: “你去告訴所羅門王的兒子猶大王羅波安、猶大全家和便雅憫，以及其餘的人民，說：

ccb.text: “你去告诉所罗门的儿子犹大王罗波安和犹大、便雅悯支派的人以及其他民众，
